translation.headline: Create invoices and estimates without signing in.
translation.subhead: Line items, tax, discounts, notes, multi-currency totals, and browser PDF export in one dense ledger workspace.
translation.freePlan: Local invoices, estimates, and PDF export with DenseMatrix footer.
translation.starterPlan: Saved templates, 25 clients, branding removal, and export history.
translation.studioPlan: Recurring invoices, payment links, and unlimited client history.
translation.businessPlan: Team templates, bulk client import, and priority workflow features.
